purpose: Define the core iterative loop for Katala GUT after L1/S1/P1 preparation.
loop: P2 bridges relativity-side geometry and quantum-side geometry using IUT mediation.
P3 performs unified computation on the mediated result.
If direct reduction fails, P3 attempts local Euclidean recovery.
If local recovery fails, P3 attempts limit Euclidean recovery.
If all recovery modes fail, feedback is returned to P2 for revision.

new_axiom_policy.introduction_condition: Only consider new axioms if repeated P2↔P3 loop failures remain structurally irreducible.
